wizard.noStepForm: No form is defined for this step.
wizard.readinessWarning: Calculation is not ready yet. Resolve blocking steps before generating results or a report.
wizard.placeholder: This step is prepared in the wizard shell, but its detailed form will be connected in a later task.
wizard.stepDescription.project: Frame the project: name, client, accommodation type, and goal. These details structure tracking, exports, and project recovery.
wizard.stepDescription.context: Select the country and climate context. These references set the baseline assumptions, prices, and climate profiles used later.
wizard.stepDescription.building: Describe the envelope and general building data. These values anchor floor areas, room counts, and consistency checks.
wizard.stepDescription.zones: Split the building by use and orientation. Zoning makes needs and scenarios easier to compare credibly.
wizard.stepDescription.usage: Enter occupancy and main usage assumptions. These explain why the building consumes energy and keep results reproducible.
wizard.stepDescription.systems: Declare the existing technical systems. They define the starting point for savings and retrofit actions.
wizard.stepDescription.bacs: Assess the automation functions already in place. The BACS score highlights gaps and improvement levers.
wizard.stepDescription.solutions: Select the solutions or bundles to test. This turns the diagnosis into comparable action options.
wizard.stepDescription.scenarios: Prepare comparison scenarios. They are used to compare the baseline with improvement options.
wizard.stepDescription.review: Review data before reporting. The final confirmation reduces omissions and locks the assumptions to present.
wizard.validation.average_occupancy_rate: Enter the average occupancy rate. Example: type 56 for 56%.
The average occupancy rate must be between 0 and 100%. Example: 56 for 56%.
wizard.validation.ecs_intensity_level: Select the DHW intensity. It indicates how important domestic hot water is in consumption.
wizard.validation.selected_solution_code: Add at least one selected solution, for example bacs_room_control or lighting_led.
wizard.validation.scenarios_present: Enter at least one baseline scenario and one improvement scenario.
wizard.validation.previous_steps: All previous steps must be valid before the final review.
wizard.fields.project.name.label: Project name
wizard.fields.project.name.tooltip: Short recognizable project name. Example: Hotel Demo Paris.
wizard.fields.project.client_name.label: Client
wizard.fields.project.client_name.toolti: Operator, owner, or commercial account for this study.
wizard.fields.project.reference_code.too: Optional internal code to find the project in your tools.
wizard.fields.project.building_type.tool: Main accommodation type. It guides usage profiles and checks.
wizard.fields.project.project_goal.label: Goal
wizard.fields.project.project_goal.toolt: Study objective: pre-audit, sales support, or scenario comparison.
wizard.fields.project.description.label: Description
wizard.fields.project.description.toolti: Free context useful to understand project scope and specifics.
wizard.fields.context.country_profile_id: Reference country for economic, regulatory, and climate assumptions.
wizard.fields.context.climate_zone_id.to: Standard climate zone used to weight heating, cooling, and solar exposure.
wizard.fields.context.regulatory_frame.t: Reading frame for the project, such as internal pre-audit or local context.
wizard.fields.context.energy_price_elect: Average electricity price used to estimate financial savings.
wizard.fields.context.energy_price_gas_e: Average gas price used to convert energy savings into euros.
wizard.fields.usage.average_occupancy_ra: Average annual room occupancy. Type 56 for 56%.
How activity varies across the year. It shapes needs and savings interpretation.
wizard.fields.usage.room_usage_intensity: Average room use level: low, standard, or high.
Importance of domestic hot water, including showers, laundry, and services.
wizard.fields.usage.restaurant_active.to: Indicates whether restaurant activity meaningfully contributes to usage and consumption.
wizard.fields.usage.seminar_activity.too: Indicates whether seminar or meeting spaces influence occupancy and ventilation.
wizard.fields.solutions.selected_solutio: Codes of solutions to test in scenarios. Example: bacs_room_control, lighting_led.
wizard.fields.solutions.automation_packa: Technical package level used to frame scenario ambition.
wizard.fields.scenarios.reference_scenar: Name of the scenario representing the current site state.
wizard.fields.scenarios.improvement_scen: Name of the scenario grouping the improvements to compare.
wizard.fields.review.report_language.too: Language used for the final report.
wizard.fields.review.include_executive_s: Adds a short summary for decision-makers and sales teams.
wizard.fields.review.include_assumptions: Adds assumptions to keep the analysis traceable.
wizard.fields.review.ready_for_report.to: Confirms that data has been reviewed and is ready for reporting.
wizard.bacs.loadError: Unable to load BACS data for this project.
wizard.bacs.intro: Enter the automation functions in place to produce a clear domain-level score.
wizard.bacs.emptyCatalog: The BACS catalog is empty for this project.
wizard.bacs.summaryDescription: Overall score, questionnaire coverage, and domain-level scores.
wizard.bacs.missingDescription: The highest-impact unchecked functions appear here to guide sales or pre-audit work.
wizard.bacs.noMissingFunctions: No high-impact missing function in the current catalog.
wizard.bacs.functions.monitoring.central: A central platform supervises major technical equipment and provides a consolidated view.
wizard.bacs.functions.monitoring.alarm_r: The site receives structured alarms for technical faults and can react quickly.
wizard.bacs.functions.heating.schedule_c: Heating operation follows planned schedules adapted to occupancy periods.
wizard.bacs.functions.heating.zone_contr: Heating is controlled by zone or functional area instead of one uniform setting.
wizard.bacs.functions.cooling_ventilatio: Cooling systems are scheduled according to occupancy and operating periods.
Ventilation adapts to occupancy or indoor air quality signals.
wizard.bacs.functions.dhw.schedule_contr: Domestic hot water production is scheduled according to building use patterns.
wizard.bacs.functions.dhw.temperature_op: Hot water production temperature is optimized while keeping service constraints.
wizard.bacs.functions.lighting.schedule_: Lighting follows schedules in common spaces and back-of-house areas.
wizard.bacs.functions.lighting.occupancy: Lighting in relevant spaces reacts to presence detection or room status.
